ultimate.n: Lightning Fire Dragon's Roar/Fire Dragon King's Roar
d:
During battle preparation, choose between Lightning Fire Dragon Mode and Fire Dragon King Mode for Natsu. Lightning Fire Dragon Mode focuses on debuffing enemies, while Fire Dragon King Mode delivers higher damage.
In Lightning Fire Dragon Mode, Natsu deals [[1400%]]<ATK> damage to all enemies within a 3-tile frontal arc and stuns them for [[3]]s. In Fire Dragon King Mode, Natsu deals [[2400%]]<ATK> damage to all enemies within a 3-tile frontal arc.
In Lightning Fire Dragon Mode, Natsu deals [[1450%]]<ATK> damage. In Fire Dragon King Mode, Natsu deals [[2500%]]<ATK> damage.
In Lightning Fire Dragon Mode, Natsu deals [[1500%]]<ATK> damage. In Fire Dragon King Mode, Natsu deals [[2600%]]<ATK> damage.
In Lightning Fire Dragon Mode, Natsu deals [[1550%]]<ATK> damage. In Fire Dragon King Mode, Natsu deals [[2700%]]<ATK> damage.
In Lightning Fire Dragon Mode, Natsu deals [[1600%]]<ATK> damage. In Fire Dragon King Mode, Natsu deals [[2800%]]<ATK> damage.

skill2.n: Lightning Fire Dragon's Iron Fist/Fire Dragon King's Iron Fist
d: In Lightning Fire Dragon Mode, Natsu deals [[500%]]<ATK> damage to the enemy who has dealt the most cumulative damage, while reducing their Haste by [[80]]. The Haste reduction effect diminishes over [[5]]s until it expires. In Fire Dragon King Mode, Natsu strikes an adjacent enemy, dealing damage equal to [[44%]] of the target's max HP and knocking them down for [[0.5]]s. This damage cannot exceed [[1000%]] of Natsu's ATK.
In Lightning Fire Dragon Mode, Natsu deals [[520%]]<ATK> damage. In Fire Dragon King Mode, he strikes an adjacent enemy, dealing damage equal to [[46%]] of the target's max HP.
In Lightning Fire Dragon Mode, Natsu deals [[540%]]<ATK> damage. In Fire Dragon King Mode, he strikes an adjacent enemy, dealing damage equal to [[48%]] of the target's max HP.
In Lightning Fire Dragon Mode, Natsu deals [[560%]]<ATK> damage. In Fire Dragon King Mode, he strikes an adjacent enemy, dealing damage equal to [[50%]] of the target's max HP.

This skill triggers only once per battle after the first defeat of an ally. Fueled by rage, Natsu increases his ATK and DEF by [[27%]] of the defeated ally's corresponding stats. Additionally, if the allied Lucy is defeated, Natsu increases his Crit by [[5]] and Crit DMG Boost by [[5]].
Natsu's ATK, Phys DEF, and Magic DEF increase by [[28%]] of the defeated ally's corresponding stats.
Natsu's ATK, Phys DEF, and Magic DEF increase by [[29%]] of the defeated ally's corresponding stats.
Natsu's ATK, Phys DEF, and Magic DEF increase by [[30%]] of the defeated ally's corresponding stats.
In Lightning Fire Dragon Mode, Natsu increases his Haste by [[9]]. In Fire Dragon King Mode, he increases his ATK by [[12%]].
In Lightning Fire Dragon Mode, Natsu increases his Haste by [[12]]. In Fire Dragon King Mode, he increases his ATK by [[16%]].
In Lightning Fire Dragon Mode, Natsu increases his Haste by [[15]]. In Fire Dragon King Mode, he increases his ATK by [[20%]].

When Natsu deals damage, he reduces the target's max HP by [[40%]] of the actual damage dealt. This effect does not apply to Bosses, and the max HP reduction per enemy cannot exceed [[800%]] of Natsu's ATK.
Natsu reduces the target's max HP by [[45%]] of the actual damage dealt.
While enemies are under any debuff inflicted by Natsu, their max HP drops by [[20%]] of Natsu's ATK every [[0.5]]s.
Natsu reduces the target's max HP by [[50%]] of the actual damage dealt.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, reduces damage taken by [[10%]] for [[20]]s when a battle starts. [[20]]s later, increases damage dealt by [[10%]] for [[20]]s.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 25 Crit, 10 Haste.

d: When Natsu causes an enemy to lose HP through any means other than his normal attacks, he burns the enemy for [[5]]s, dealing [[80%]]<ATK> damage every [[0.5]]s.
